response.responseText:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soapenv:Body><ns:MakeAppointmentResponse xmlns:ns="http://ws.apache.org/axis2"><ns:return><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Result>

    <AppointmentStatus>CONFIRMED</AppointmentStatus>
    <AppointmentNumber>2250</AppointmentNumber>
    <Date>25-Jul-2023</Date>
    <Day>TUESDAY</Day>
    <StartTime>07:30</StartTime>
    <EndTime>07:40</EndTime>
    <DoctorName>KR VZNERRZ NZREEM NEZH</DoctorName>
    <ReferredBy>SELF</ReferredBy>
    <Specialty>OPHTHALMOLOGY</Specialty>
    <Clinic>5th Floor Clinic</Clinic>
    <Room>5.5</Room>
    <CaseType>FU</CaseType>
    <ReasonCode></ReasonCode>
    <Remark></Remark>
  </AppointmentBookingConfirmation>
</Result>
</ns:return></ns:MakeAppointmentResponse></soapenv:Body></soapenv:Envelope>
